title: 'Low BP, Airborne For 4 Hours': Hyderabad-Hubballi Fly91 Flight Diverted To Bengaluru After Technical Snag; Passengers Recount Ordeal
description: Reportedly, for nearly four hours, the plane-circled over areas such as Mundgod, Davanagere, and Shivamogga while the crew worked to resolve the issue and prepare for a safe touchdown.
